title: Dropout Risk Students
description: You are given four tables: students, courses, enrollments (which course a student is taking), and completions (courses a student has finished). Find names of students enrolled in at least 3 courses but who have completed fewer than 2, ordered alphabetically.
inputFormat:
students(id, name, major)
courses(id, title, credits)
enrollments(id, student_id, course_id, semester)
completions(id, student_id, course_id, grade)
outputFormat: One student name per line, ordered alphabetically.
constraints: Use correlated subqueries in the WHERE clause. Count enrollments >= 3 AND completions < 2 per student. Include ORDER BY name. Only SELECT queries are allowed.
sampleSolution: SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.id) >= 3 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM completions c WHERE c.student_id = s.id) < 2 ORDER BY s.name;
hint: Use two correlated subqueries: one counting enrollments >= 3, another counting completions < 2.

testCases.setupSql: CREATE TABLE students (id INTEGER, name TEXT, major TEXT); CREATE TABLE courses (id INTEGER, title TEXT, credits INTEGER); CREATE TABLE enrollments (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, semester TEXT); CREATE TABLE completions (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, grade TEXT); INSERT INTO students VALUES (1,'Alice','CS'),(2,'Bob','Math'),(3,'Carol','Physics'); INSERT INTO courses VALUES (1,'Algo',3),(2,'DB',3),(3,'ML',3),(4,'Calc',4); INSERT INTO enrollments VALUES (1,1,1,'F24'),(2,1,2,'F24'),(3,1,3,'F24'),(4,2,1,'F24'),(5,2,4,'F24'),(6,3,1,'F24'),(7,3,2,'F24'),(8,3,3,'F24'),(9,3,4,'F24'); INSERT INTO completions VALUES (1,1,1,'A'),(2,3,1,'A'),(3,3,2,'B');

CREATE TABLE students (id INTEGER, name TEXT, major TEXT); CREATE TABLE courses (id INTEGER, title TEXT, credits INTEGER); CREATE TABLE enrollments (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, semester TEXT); CREATE TABLE completions (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, grade TEXT); INSERT INTO students VALUES (1,'Dan','Bio'),(2,'Eve','Chem'),(3,'Frank','CS'),(4,'Grace','Math'); INSERT INTO courses VALUES (1,'Cell',3),(2,'Org',3),(3,'Biochem',3),(4,'Algo',3),(5,'Data',3); INSERT INTO enrollments VALUES (1,1,1,'S24'),(2,1,2,'S24'),(3,1,3,'S24'),(4,2,1,'S24'),(5,2,4,'S24'),(6,3,3,'S24'),(7,3,4,'S24'),(8,3,5,'S24'),(9,4,1,'S24'),(10,4,2,'S24'),(11,4,3,'S24'); INSERT INTO completions VALUES (1,3,3,'A'),(2,3,4,'B'),(3,4,2,'A');

CREATE TABLE students (id INTEGER, name TEXT, major TEXT); CREATE TABLE courses (id INTEGER, title TEXT, credits INTEGER); CREATE TABLE enrollments (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, semester TEXT); CREATE TABLE completions (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, grade TEXT); INSERT INTO students VALUES (1,'Hank','Art'),(2,'Iris','Law'); INSERT INTO courses VALUES (1,'Studio',3),(2,'History',3),(3,'Theory',3),(4,'Contract',3); INSERT INTO enrollments VALUES (1,1,1,'F24'),(2,1,2,'F24'),(3,2,3,'F24'),(4,2,4,'F24'); INSERT INTO completions VALUES (1,1,1,'B');

CREATE TABLE students (id INTEGER, name TEXT, major TEXT); CREATE TABLE courses (id INTEGER, title TEXT, credits INTEGER); CREATE TABLE enrollments (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, semester TEXT); CREATE TABLE completions (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, grade TEXT); INSERT INTO students VALUES (1,'Jack','Econ'),(2,'Kate','Poli'); INSERT INTO courses VALUES (1,'Micro',3),(2,'Macro',3),(3,'Stats',3),(4,'IR',3),(5,'Theory',3); INSERT INTO enrollments VALUES (1,1,1,'F24'),(2,1,2,'F24'),(3,1,3,'F24'),(4,2,3,'F24'),(5,2,4,'F24'),(6,2,5,'F24'); INSERT INTO completions VALUES (1,1,1,'A');

CREATE TABLE students (id INTEGER, name TEXT, major TEXT); CREATE TABLE courses (id INTEGER, title TEXT, credits INTEGER); CREATE TABLE enrollments (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, semester TEXT); CREATE TABLE completions (id INTEGER, student_id INTEGER, course_id INTEGER, grade TEXT); INSERT INTO students VALUES (1,'Leo','Music'),(2,'Mia','Dance'); INSERT INTO courses VALUES (1,'Theory',2),(2,'Harmony',2),(3,'Rhythm',2),(4,'Movement',2),(5,'Technique',2); INSERT INTO enrollments VALUES (1,1,1,'S25'),(2,1,2,'S25'),(3,1,3,'S25'),(4,2,3,'S25'),(5,2,4,'S25'),(6,2,5,'S25'); INSERT INTO completions VALUES (1,1,1,'A'),(2,1,2,'B'),(3,2,3,'A'),(4,2,4,'A');
